stemHtml: A pilot in flight hears an urgency message on an area control frequency that is acknowledged by the area controller. What action must the pilot take?

options.a: Immediately stop all transmissions on the frequency being used by the urgency traffic.
options.b: Take care not to interfere with the transmission of the urgency traffic.
options.c: Immediately inform the controller of his/her position in order to provide assistance if necessary.
options.d: Write down the information being transmitted and re-transmit it on the emergency frequency 121.5 MHz.
